strategy: Attack with Myth, Life, or Death (he takes +25% each); never Balance (80% resist).
Do not leave him alone at high Health. The moment both minions die he casts Big Bad Hound every Round, so AoE all three down together or be ready to finish him immediately.
Close before the fight drags. Starting after Round 5, Berkshire randomly adds a free 0-pip Sandstorm each Round.
Blade and AoE the whole board so the minions and boss fall in the same window.
At 7,800 Health with two minions, this is soloable with a strong AoE hitter.
cheatNotes: Starting after Round 5, Berkshire randomly adds a free 0-pip Sandstorm each Round, so close the fight before it drags on.
The moment both minions are dead, Tamworth casts Big Bad Hound every Round, so AoE all three down together or be ready to finish him immediately.
